mnemonics: IAC Analysis: Identify Attributes, Connect Classes
keyPoints: Information classes represent data entities stored by the system (e.g., Customer, Order).
Analysis classes are high-level conceptual classes identified during requirements analysis.
Behavioral analysis focuses on dynamic interactions between objects and system operations.
commonMistakes: Confusing analysis classes with implementation classes or database tables.
Defining classes with vague responsibilities that don't encapsulate a single concept.
Focusing only on attributes while neglecting class operations and collaborations.
